subject: SIP Weekly Update - Week ending 5 Sep

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Performance Dashboard

A/ Topline/P&L (Aug full-month)


Highlights

   1.

   Topline: ADO 209k (107% RR, +14% MoM, CB% +0.4pp MoM), ADG $2.1M (104% RR,
   +5% MoM, CB% +0.2pp MoM).
   1.

      WH cross-selling ADG 90% RR, ADG CB% 87% RR, due to ABS missing
      target: CB choice ADO outperformed with low ABS ($4), while local FBS
      missed ADO target with high ABS ($10).
      2.

   Seller/standalone P&L: $232k, +$708k vs target, +$149k MoM.
   1.

      Local SIP seller P&L +$842k vs target, +$272k vs Jul, due to more
      than expected budget passback from ID leading to marketing budget
      underspending; to optimize budget spending in Sep to maximize
topline while
      maintaining seller P&L breakeven
      2.

      CNSIP seller P&L -$134k vs target, -$123k vs Jul, due to
      new-to-market 3-month commission waiver higher than expected due
to topline
      outperformance; commission waiver booked as cost in CNSIP seller P&L
      (instead of foregone revenue in MP PC2) due to ops challenge to
set waiver
      for large amount of CNSIP shops in the system
      3.

   Combined PC2 at Shopee level: $4.56M, +$0.87M vs target, +$0.26M MoM.
   1.

      Local SIP MP PC2 -$196k vs target, due to higher MY PRM than target
      (MY provided additional fashion PRM in Aug which was not booked during MP
      budget submission).


B/ Regional direct selling (as of 8 Sep)

Highlights

   1.

   [Follow-up question from last weekly] I think we need to understand
   better why the ABS is 2X of SIP. I do not think it is an issue of sellers
   pricing 2x higher because they sell overseas?

mix.

higher than the same SIP SKU price, due to system calculating destination
mkt price based on source mkt sku’s original price (vs SIP uses sku’s
discounted price). We will fix this system issue by mid-Sep. RMs are
pushing sellers to lower prices based on discounted prices before system
ready.

ASP SK

ASP SKUs), we will monitor and deep-dive once we have more comparable SKUs
